info.description: RentalCore is a professional equipment rental management system. This API provides endpoints for managing jobs, customers, devices, products, rental equipment, and financial data.
info.title: RentalCore API

get.description: Returns a list of customers with optional search filtering
Returns a single customer by ID

put.description: Updates an existing customer by ID

get.description: Returns a list of devices with optional filtering
Returns all devices currently available for rental
Returns devices available during the date range of the specified job
get.summary: Get available devices for a job

get.description: Returns the full device tree grouped by category/product with optional availability filtering by date range

parameters.description: Job ID to exclude from availability conflicts
parameters.name: job_id

get.description: Returns a single device by ID or serial number
Returns summary financial statistics (revenue, expenses, profit)
Returns a paginated list of financial transactions with optional filtering
Returns a paginated list of jobs with optional filtering

parameters.description: Job payload (customerid, statusid, description, startdate, enddate, discount, revenue)
parameters.name: job

get.description: Returns a single job by ID

put.description: Updates an existing job by ID

get.description: Returns a list of all products with optional filtering
Returns a single product by ID
Returns rental equipment list (functionality moved to WarehouseCore)

post.description: Creates rental equipment (functionality moved to WarehouseCore)

valid.description: Valid is true if Float64 is not NULL
Valid is true if String is not NULL
Valid is true if Time is not NULL
